title: camellia wardii var. muricatula
intro: Camellia wardii var. muricatula, also known as the Yunnan camellia, is a plant species within the Camellia genus, native to the Yunnan province in China. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, due to its high content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating coughs and sore throats, and supporting cardiovascular health. In traditional Chinese medicine, Camellia wardii var. muricatula is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and has also been used to make herbal supplements and extracts.
